en.title: Action Gallery Example Vault UI
en.subtitle: A richer reference Vault that keeps multiple action types visible: pre-listing reserve, post-listing claim, always-available refund, and read-only refresh.
en.states.stageUnavailable: This action is not available in the current token phase.
en.states.connectWallet: Connect wallet to use this action.
en.states.approvalNeeded: Approve the Vault before writing this action.
en.errors.amountRequired: Enter an amount greater than zero.
en.errors.insufficientBalance: Amount exceeds the current wallet balance.
en.errors.insufficientFunds: Insufficient wallet balance to complete this transaction.
en.errors.walletDisconnected: Connect a wallet before sending this transaction.
en.errors.simulationFailed: The transaction could not pass simulation.
en.errors.readFailed: Unable to refresh Vault data right now.
en.errors.txFailed: Transaction failed. Check wallet status and try again.
en.sections.flowStatusDescription: Show the round, time, and aggregate state first so the write controls feel grounded in contract data.
en.sections.deadlineHint: When the countdown completes, stage-specific actions can move from read state to settlement state.
en.sections.actionLabDescription: Each card demonstrates a different action policy: internal-market, DEX-listed, both-stage, or read-only.
en.descriptions.reserve: Pre-listing write flow with ERC20 allowance, approve, simulate, write, confirmation, and refetch.
en.descriptions.claim: Listed-only claim flow that remains visible before listing and explains why it is disabled.
en.descriptions.refund: Both-stage write flow for contracts that allow settlement or refund before and after listing.
en.descriptions.refresh: Read-only control for manual refetch without implying a wallet transaction.
en.notices.fixture: This is a public workflow fixture. It demonstrates UI states only and does not endorse a factory, token, or Vault.
en.notices.previewData: Preview fixture data is active because the route is using the template's neutral preview addresses.

zh.title: Action Gallery Example Vault UI
zh.subtitle: 更丰富的参考 Vault：同时展示内盘 reserve、Listing 后 claim、双阶段 refund 和只读 refresh 等多种操作按钮。
zh.states.marketPhaseDexListed: 当前是 DEX Listing 阶段
zh.states.stageUnavailable: 当前 Token 阶段不能执行这个操作。
zh.states.connectWallet: 连接钱包后才能执行这个操作。
zh.states.approvalNeeded: 写入 Vault 前需要先授权。
zh.errors.amountRequired: 请输入大于 0 的数量。
zh.errors.insufficientBalance: 输入数量超过当前钱包余额。
zh.errors.exceedsRefundable: 输入数量超过当前可退款额度。
zh.errors.insufficientFunds: 钱包余额不足，无法完成这笔交易。
zh.errors.walletDisconnected: 请先连接钱包后再发起交易。
zh.errors.userRejected: 你已取消这次钱包签名请求。
zh.errors.simulationFailed: 这笔交易没有通过模拟检查。
zh.errors.readFailed: 暂时无法刷新 Vault 数据。
zh.errors.txFailed: 交易失败，请检查钱包状态后重试。
zh.sections.flowStatusDescription: 先展示轮次、时间和总状态，让写入操作建立在清晰的合约读取数据上。
zh.sections.deadlineHint: 倒计时结束后，阶段相关操作可以从读取状态进入结算状态。
zh.sections.actionLabDescription: 每张操作卡展示一种动作策略：内盘、Listing 后、双阶段或只读。
zh.descriptions.reserve: 内盘写入流程：包含 ERC20 allowance、approve、simulate、write、确认和 refetch。
zh.descriptions.claim: 只在 Listing 后可用的领取流程；Listing 前也保留按钮，并说明为什么不可点。
zh.descriptions.refund: 双阶段写入流程，适合内盘和 Listing 后都允许结算或退款的合约。
zh.descriptions.refresh: 只读刷新操作，用于手动重新读取数据，不暗示钱包交易。
zh.notices.fixture: 这是公开工作流示例，只展示 UI 状态，不代表对任何 factory、Token 或 Vault 背书。
zh.notices.previewData: 当前路由使用模板的中性预览地址，因此启用了预览 fixture 数据。
